components.sessionRequest.title: Request a session
components.sessionRequest.subtitle: with {name} · {department}
components.sessionRequest.step1Label: What would you like to focus on?
components.sessionRequest.step1Help: Pick one or more topics from {name}'s areas of expertise. You can also skip this and just describe it in the next step.
components.sessionRequest.step1NoSkills: {name} hasn't listed any teachable skills yet — skip ahead and describe what you want to discuss.
components.sessionRequest.step2Label: What is the one specific question you want to leave this session with an answer to?

components.reflection.promptManagedWell: What did you feel you managed well this week?
components.reflection.errorAnswerOne: Please answer at least one of the two questions.
components.reflection.toastSaved: Saved. We picked out some skill signals — review them below.
components.reflection.errorSave: Could not save your reflection. Try again.
components.reflection.applyNothing: Nothing to apply — entry kept in the log.
components.reflection.confirmDelete: Delete this reflection? This cannot be undone.
components.reflection.toastReclassified: Re-classified. Review the new skill signals below.
components.reflection.errorReclassifyUnc: We couldn't pull any skill signals out of this entry. Try expanding the wording and re-running.
components.reflection.errorReclassifyFai: The classifier was unreachable. Try again in a moment.
components.reflection.errorReclassifyGen: Could not re-classify this reflection. Try again in a moment.
components.reflection.dueBodyFirst: A short reflection helps us refine your matches and surface skills you might want to teach or learn.
components.reflection.dueBodyDays: It's been {days} days. Two short answers, that's it.
components.reflection.formPlaceholder: A few sentences is plenty. Only you will see this.
components.reflection.empty: No entries yet. Your check-ins will live here, with the AI-extracted skill signals from each one.
components.reflection.skillSignalsHint: — click × on any chip to drop it before applying
components.reflection.noSignals: No clear skill signals were detected in this entry — it was either too short or only contained generic phrases.
